message:
feat(cli): Add workers discover command with comprehensive probe

Implement rch workers discover to auto-detect potential workers from:
- ~/.ssh/config Host entries
- Shell aliases (~/.bashrc, ~/.zshrc, etc.)

Features:
- Lists discovered hosts with source attribution
- --probe flag tests SSH connectivity and gathers system info:
  - CPU cores, memory, disk space
  - Rust version, architecture
  - Validates minimum requirements (4 cores, 4GB RAM, 10GB disk)
- --add --yes flag writes discovered hosts to workers.toml

Also adds stub for workers deploy-binary command (to be implemented).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
